summary: Tested pre-deploy refactor features. Fixed Footer.jsx triple-click bug (state was reset on each render). All features working: 'Get The Playbook' button triggers lead magnet popup, hidden admin link via triple-click, Armory Admin Modal with 5 accordion sections, Investor Blog panel and Studio Updates tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Footer.jsx triple-click handler was using local variables (clickCount, clickTimer) that reset on each render - changed to useRef
LeadMagnetPopup correctly listens for 'trigger-lead-magnet' custom event
Blog.jsx 'Get The Playbook' button correctly dispatches window event instead of Link navigation
AdminArmoryTab.jsx ProductModal has all 5 accordion sections (basics, content, media, purchase, seo) with data-testid attributes
ProductPage.jsx includes who_its_for and why_it_works sections (conditional rendering when data exists)
InvestorPortal.jsx has StudioUpdatesSection that displays investor blog posts
AdminInvestorTab.jsx has InvestorBlogPanel for creating/managing investor-only blog posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-deploy refactor features all working. Key fix: Footer.jsx triple-click required useRef instead of local variables. Lead magnet popup triggered via custom event 'trigger-lead-magnet'. Investor Blog visible in admin under Investors > Blog Posts tab. Studio Updates visible in Investor Portal sidebar.

details: Button on Blog page (/blog) has data-testid='get-the-playbook-btn'
Clicking button dispatches 'trigger-lead-magnet' window event
LeadMagnetPopup listens for event and shows popup with email form
Popup shows 'Get The Producer's Playbook' title with email input
FIXED: Footer.jsx was using local variables that reset on each render
Changed clickCount and clickTimer to useRef to persist between renders
Triple-clicking 'Shadow Wolves Productions' text in footer navigates to /admin
Element has data-testid='hidden-admin-link'
ProductModal opens from 'Add Product' or Edit buttons
5 collapsible accordion sections: Product Basics, Product Page Content, Media, Purchase & Access, SEO
Each section has data-testid (section-basics, section-content, section-media, section-purchase, section-seo)
'Generate SEO from Content' button present in SEO section with data-testid='ai-seo-assist-btn'
ProductPage.jsx includes section-who-its-for and section-why-it-works
Sections only render when product has who_its_for array items or why_it_works content
Currently no products have these fields populated, so sections don't show (correct conditional behavior)
Backend model den_item.py includes who_its_for: List[str] and why_it_works: Optional[str] fields
Admin can access Investor Blog via Admin > Investors > Blog Posts tab
InvestorBlogPanel allows creating/editing/deleting blog posts
Blog post fields: title, summary, category (Update/Milestone/Financial/Production), published checkbox, HTML content
Investor Portal shows 'Studio Updates' in sidebar navigation
StudioUpdatesSection displays published investor blog posts with category badges
Test post 'Q1 2026 Production Update' visible with MILESTONE tag

footer_triple_click.issue: clickCount and clickTimer were local variables that reset on each React render, breaking triple-click detection
footer_triple_click.fix: Changed to useRef (clickCountRef, clickTimerRef) to persist values between renders
